name: PWA 離線支援
desc: 基礎 Web App 配置，讓網頁可安裝至桌面
code:
<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="default">
<script>
  if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
      navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js');
    });
  }
</script>

name: Viewport-fit Cover
desc: 解決 iPhone 滿版顯示與瀏海視覺問題
code:
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover">
<style>
  body { background: #111; padding-top: env(safe-area-inset-top); }
</style>

name: Safe Area Inset Top
desc: 自動避讓狀態列與靈動島區域
code: Ⲙ𝔬ⲃⳝ𝔭 Header

name: Safe Area Inset Bottom
desc: 避讓底端小白條，防止按鈕被擋住
code:
<footer style="padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); background: #1a1a1a; position: fixed; bottom: 0; width: 100%;">
  <button style="width: 100%; height: 50px; background: #06C755; border: none; color: #fff;">立即執行</button>
</footer>

name: 消除 300ms 延遲
desc: 優化 Touch 事件，提升按鈕點擊靈敏度
code:
<style>
  .fast-click {
    touch-action: manipulation;
    -webkit-user-select: none;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
</style>
<button class="fast-click" onclick="console.log('Instant!')">快速響應按鈕</button>

name: Webkit Tap Highlight
desc: 移除行動端點擊時出現的藍色方框
code: 點擊無藍框反饋

name: Momentum Scrolling
desc: 開啟 iOS 絲滑的物理慣性捲動
code: 滑動此區域感受慣性速度

name: 禁長按系統選單
desc: 防止長按按鈕跳出複製/儲存圖片選單

name: Overscroll Behavior
desc: 禁止下拉重新整理導致的橡皮筋回彈
code:
<style>
  body {
    overscroll-behavior-y: contain;
    /* 防止網頁下拉觸發瀏覽器原生的重新整理 */
  }
</style>

name: Smart App Banner
desc: 引導用戶安裝原生 App 的智慧橫幅
code: <meta name="apple-itunes-app" content="app-id=myAppID, affiliate-data=myAffiliateData, app-argument=myURL">

name: Haptic Vibrate API
desc: 點擊成功時讓手機產生物理微震動
code:
<script>
  function triggerHaptic() {
    if (navigator.vibrate) {
      // 模式：震動 10ms，間隔 50ms，震動 10ms
      navigator.vibrate([10, 50, 10]);
    }
  }
</script>
<button onclick="triggerHaptic()" style="padding: 15px; background: #06C755; border-radius: 12px;">物理震動測試</button>

name: Web Share API
desc: 一鍵喚起手機系統原生分享視窗
code:
<script>
  async function shareApp() {
    if (navigator.share) {
      try {
        await navigator.share({
          title: 'Ⲙ𝔬ⲃⳝ𝔭 Matrix',
          text: '最強行動開發矩陣',
          url: window.location.href
        });
      } catch (err) { console.log('Share failed'); }
    }
  }
</script>
<button onclick="shareApp()">呼叫系統分享</button>

name: Orientation Lock
desc: 偵測並提醒用戶旋轉螢幕以獲取最佳觀感
code: 請轉為橫向模式以開始實驗

name: Inputmode Optimization
desc: 針對不同欄位自動切換數字/英文鍵盤
code:
<input type="text" inputmode="decimal" placeholder="請輸入金額">

<input type="text" inputmode="tel" placeholder="請輸入電話">

<input type="text" inputmode="email" placeholder="請輸入電子郵件">

name: Sticky Footer Fix
desc: 修正 iOS 鍵盤彈起時底部導航欄位移
code:
<script>
  // 監聽視覺視窗縮放，動態隱藏導航
  window.visualViewport.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    const footer = document.querySelector('footer');
    footer.style.display = window.visualViewport.height < window.innerHeight ? 'none' : 'block';
  });
</script>

name: Touch Move Tracker
desc: 高精度追蹤手指滑動軌跡與坐標
code: 觸摸此處

name: Splash Screen
desc: 自訂 PWA 啟動時的品牌 Logo 畫面 (iOS)
code:
<link rel="apple-touch-startup-image" href="launch-640x1136.png" media="(device-width: 320px) and (device-height: 568px) and (-webkit-device-pixel-ratio: 2)">
<link rel="apple-touch-startup-image" href="launch-750x1334.png" media="(device-width: 375px) and (device-height: 667px) and (-webkit-device-pixel-ratio: 2)">

name: Pull-to-Refresh UI
desc: 仿 App 質感的下拉更新動畫組件
code:
🔄 鬆開以更新...

向下拖動頁面測試 (模擬)

name: Status Bar Style
desc: 控制 iOS 頂部狀態列文字顏色
code:
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
<style>
  :root { --line-green: #06C755; }
  body { background: #000; } /* 狀態列文字會變白色 */
</style>

name: System Font Stack
desc: 自動調用 San Francisco 或 Roboto 原生字體
code: 這是系統原生黑體，渲染極其銳利。

name: Double Tap Prevention
desc: 防止快速連點導致的意外縮放
code:
<style>
  button, a {
    touch-action: manipulation; 
    /* 告訴瀏覽器該元素不需要等待雙擊判定 */
  }
</style>
<button style='background:#06C755; padding:10px;'>快速連點我</button>

name: Dynamic Viewport Height
desc: 修正 100vh 在行動版包含工具欄的問題
code:
<style>
  .full-height {
    height: 100vh; /* 退化方案 */
    height: calc(var(--vh, 1vh) * 100);
  }
</style>
<script>
  const vh = window.innerHeight * 0.01;
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--vh', `${vh}px`);
</script>

name: Active State CSS
desc: 按鈕按下時的按壓縮放視覺反饋
code:
<style>
  .btn-push {
    transition: transform 0.1s;
    background: #06C755; border:none; padding:15px; border-radius:12px; color:white;
  }
  .btn-push:active { transform: scale(0.9); opacity: 0.8; }
</style>
<button class="btn-push">按壓反饋測試</button>

name: Swipe Back Support
desc: 支援從螢幕邊緣滑動返回上一頁 (邏輯提示)
code: 左側邊緣 30px 為感應區

name: Adaptive Icon Set
desc: 提供不同尺寸的桌面圖示以適配各機型
code:
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="/apple-touch-icon.png">

<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="/favicon-32x32.png">

name: Battery Status Check
desc: 低電量模式時自動停用高耗能動畫
code:
<script>
  navigator.getBattery().then(battery => {
    if (battery.level < 0.2 && !battery.charging) {
      document.body.classList.add('low-battery-mode');
      console.log('已自動關閉 3D 動畫以節省電量');
    }
  });
</script>

name: Network Awareness
desc: 偵測 4G/5G/Wi-Fi 以調整圖片解析度
code:
<script>
  const conn = navigator.connection || navigator.mozConnection || navigator.webkitConnection;
  if (conn) {
    console.log(`網路類型: ${conn.effectiveType}`);
    if (conn.saveData) { console.log('用戶啟用了節流模式'); }
  }
</script>

name: Scroll Snapping
desc: 橫向滑動卡片時自動對齊螢幕中心

name: Fast Click Library
desc: 整合 polyfill 確保全平台觸控無延遲 (Legacy Fix)
code:
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/fastclick/1.0.6/fastclick.min.js"></script>
<script>
  if ('addEventListener' in document) {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
      FastClick.attach(document.body);
    }, false);
  }
</script>

name: Image Long Press
desc: 自訂長按圖片後的保存或分享選單
code: 長按圖片系統選單已被禁用，請自訂 UI

name: Mobile Dialog Lock
desc: 彈窗出現時背景禁止捲動
code:
<script>
  function toggleModal(show) {
    document.body.style.overflow = show ? 'hidden' : '';
    // iOS 額外處理
    document.body.style.position = show ? 'fixed' : '';
    document.body.style.width = '100%';
  }
</script>
<button onclick="toggleModal(true)" style="background:#333; padding:10px; border-radius:8px;">開啟彈窗並鎖定背景</button>

name: Auto Fill Fix
desc: 美化 iOS 自動填滿密碼後的黃色背景
code:
<style>
  input:-webkit-autofill,
  input:-webkit-autofill:hover,
  input:-webkit-autofill:focus {
    -webkit-text-fill-color: #06C755;
    -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 0px 1000px #1a1a1a inset;
    transition: background-color 5000s ease-in-out 0s;
  }
</style>
<input type="password" placeholder="請輸入密碼">

name: Gesture Zoom Lock
desc: 禁止兩指縮放以保持 UI 佈局穩定
code:
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
<script>
  document.addEventListener('gesturestart', (e) => e.preventDefault());
</script>

name: In-App Browser Det
desc: 偵測是否在 Line 或 FB 內開網頁並給予提示

name: Deep Linking
desc: 點擊網址直接開啟手機內安裝的特定 App
code:
在 Instagram 中開啟個人檔案

若未安裝則無反應，通常搭配延時跳轉 App Store

name: Dark Mode Toggle
desc: 偵測手機系統光暗模式並自動同步
code: 系統切換深色時，我也會自動變色

name: Tab Bar Lift
desc: 底部導航欄隨滑動方向隱藏或顯示
code:
<script>
  let lastScroll = 0;
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const currentScroll = window.pageYOffset;
    const nav = document.querySelector('.tab-bar');
    nav.style.transform = currentScroll > lastScroll ? 'translateY(100%)' : 'translateY(0)';
    lastScroll = currentScroll;
  });
</script>

name: Edge Swipe Gesture
desc: 自訂左右側滑觸發特定功能 (UI 模擬)
code: 左右滑動此區域試試

name: Mobile Video Autoplay
desc: 處理行動端靜音自動播放策略
code:
<video autoplay muted playsinline loop style="width:100%; border-radius:15px;">
  <source src="https://www.w3schools.com/html/mov_bbb.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

name: App Store Badge
desc: 頁尾展示符合規範的下載標誌 (SVG)

name: Hardware Accel
desc: 強制開啟 GPU 加速以確保轉場不掉幀
code: 此元件已強制硬體加速渲染

name: Minimal UI Meta
desc: 隱藏 Safari 下方多餘的網址操作欄 (遺留技術)
code: 註：現代 iOS 多改用 manifest 控管全螢幕

name: Custom URL Schemes
desc: 讓網頁能被特定的協議(my-app://)喚醒
code:
<script>
  // 註冊邏輯通常在原生 App 內，前端僅負責調用
  function openMyApp() {
    window.location.href = "mobsys-lab://open?param=123";
    setTimeout(() => {
      window.location.href = "https://apps.apple.com/app/id123456";
    }, 2500);
  }
</script>
<button onclick="openMyApp()">嘗試喚醒 Ⲙ𝔬ⲃⳝ𝔭 App</button>

name: Biometric Support
desc: 預留 WebAuthn 臉部或指紋識別接口
code:
<script>
  async function testAuth() {
    if (window.PublicKeyCredential) {
      console.log('此裝置支援生物識別 API (WebAuthn)');
      // 接下來呼叫 navigator.credentials.create()
    } else {
      alert('裝置不支援生物識別');
    }
  }
</script>
<button onclick="testAuth()">檢測 FaceID/TouchID 支援</button>

name: Shake Gesture
desc: 偵測「搖一搖」手機觸發回報功能
code: 注意：iOS 13+ 需要先經由用戶點擊授權 DeviceOrientation

name: Touch Target Size
desc: 確保所有可點擊項不小於 44px (蘋果規範)
code:
<style>
  .mobile-btn {
    min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    padding: 8px 16px; background: #222; border-radius: 8px;
  }
</style>
<button class="mobile-btn">符合規範按鈕</button>

name: Retina Display Fix
desc: 針對高像素密度螢幕顯示 2x/3x 圖片

name: Mobile Keyboard Res
desc: 監聽鍵盤高度變化動態調整頁面高度
code:
<script>
  if ('visualViewport' in window) {
    window.visualViewport.addEventListener('resize', () => {
      const offset = window.innerHeight - window.visualViewport.height;
      document.body.style.transform = `translateY(-${offset}px)`;
    });
  }
</script>

name: System Share Sheet
desc: 呼叫 iOS 原生 AirDrop 與分享功能
code:
<script>
  function nativeShare() {
    navigator.share({ 
      title: 'Ⲙ𝔬ⲃⳝ𝔭', 
      files: [fileObj] // 支援分享檔案 (需在 HTTPS 下)
    }).catch(console.error);
  }
</script>

name: Titi Mobile Shield
desc: 針對手機端異常行為(如非法注入)的防禦機制
code:
<script>
  const isTampered = window.outerHeight === 0 || window.outerWidth === 0;
  if (isTampered) {
    document.body.innerHTML = '🛡️ 安全環境檢查未通過';
    throw new Error('Security Breach');
  }
</script>

name: CI/CD Auto Deploy
desc: Push 代碼後自動編譯並部署網頁
code:
# .github/workflows/deploy.yml
name: Deploy
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Deploy to Pages
        uses: peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v3

name: Workflow Dispatch
desc: 手動觸發 GitHub 任務的互動介面
code:
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      env:
        description: '部署環境'
        required: true
        default: 'dev'

name: Cron Job Task
desc: 定時執行(如每天凌晨備份資料)
code:
on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 0 * * *' # 每天凌晨執行

name: Secret Management
desc: 安全存放 API Key 等敏感資訊
code:
steps:
  - name: API Call
    env:
      TOKEN: ${{ secrets.MY_SECRET_TOKEN }}
    run: curl -H "Authorization: $TOKEN" https://api.example.com

name: Release Auto Generator
desc: 自動打包版本並生成 Changelog

name: Image Optimizer
desc: 自動壓縮上傳的圖片並轉為 WebP
code:
- uses: calibreapp/image-actions@main
  with:
    githubToken: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
    compressOnly: false

name: Concurrency Control
desc: 限制同時執行的任務數量防止超載

name: Cache Dependency
desc: 快取安裝包以縮短每次編譯時間
code:
- uses: actions/cache@v3
  with:
    path: ~/.npm
    key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}

name: Environment Secrets
desc: 區分開發與正式環境的密鑰配置
code:
jobs:
  deploy:
    environment: production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps: [...]

name: Discord Webhook
desc: 任務成功或失敗時推送到 Discord
code:
- name: Discord Notify
  uses: rjstone/discord-webhook-notify@v1
  if: always()
  with:
    severity: info
    details: 'Ⲙ𝔬ⲃⳝ𝔭 工作流執行成功！'

name: Telegram Bot Notify
desc: Actions 執行進度實時推送至手機

name: Auto Issue Responder
desc: 用戶留言後機器人自動分類與回覆
code:
- name: Welcome Issue
  uses: actions/github-script@v6
  with:
    script: |
      github.rest.issues.createComment({
        issue_number: context.issue.number,
        owner: context.repo.owner,
        repo: context.repo.repo,
        body: '👋 感謝反饋！Ⲙ𝔬ⲃⳝ𝔭 核心小組已收到您的訊息。'
      })

name: Artifacts Upload
desc: 保存任務產出的檔案供下載 90 天
code:
- name: Upload Build Folder
  uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
  with:
    name: release-dist
    path: dist/
    retention-days: 90

name: Job Matrix Strategy
desc: 並行測試不同作業系統與版本環境
code:
strategy:
  matrix:
    os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
    node: [16, 18, 20]
runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
steps:
  - uses: actions/setup-node@v3
    with:
      node-version: ${{ matrix.node }}

name: Repository Dispatch
desc: 支援從外部網站遠端觸發 Actions
code:
# 觸發 API 範例
curl -X POST -H "Authorization: token $GH_PAT" \
     -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" \
     https://api.github.com/repos/user/repo/dispatches \
     -d '{"event_type": "external_trigger"}'

name: Linting & Auto Format
desc: 自動校正代碼縮排與語法錯誤
code:
- name: Run Prettier
  run: npx prettier --write .
- name: Check Lint
  run: npm run lint

name: Broken Link Checker
desc: 自動掃描全站是否有死連結
code:
- name: Check Links
  uses: raviqqe/muffet-action@v2
  with:
    arguments: --color=always https://mobsys-lab.io

name: SSL Cert Auto Update
desc: 監控並自動續期 HTTPS 證書狀態
code:
- name: Certbot Renewal
  run: sudo certbot renew
# 通常搭配 schedule cron 使用

name: JSON Database Sync
desc: 自動同步倉庫內的 JSON 數據至前端
code:
- name: Update Config
  run: | 
    python scripts/sync_json.py
    git config --local user.email "action@github.com"
    git commit -am "🔄 Auto-sync JSON Matrix"
    git push

name: Security Audit
desc: 自動掃描依賴項是否有安全漏洞
code:
- name: NPM Audit
  run: npm audit --audit-level=high

name: SEO Sitemap Gen
desc: 部署後自動生成並提交 Sitemap
code:
- name: Generate Sitemap
  uses: cicirello/generate-sitemap@v1
  with:
    base-url-path: https://mobsys.io/

name: Lighthouse Score Report
desc: 自動測試網頁效能分並生成報告
code:
- name: Lighthouse Report
  uses: treosh/lighthouse-ci-action@v9
  with:
    urls: 'https://mobsys.io/'
    uploadArtifacts: true

name: PR Auto Labeler
desc: 根據變動範圍自動幫 PR 貼標籤
code:
- uses: actions/labeler@v4
  with:
    repo-token: "${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}"

name: Auto Cleanup Old Rel
desc: 定時刪除過期已失效的發布版本
code:
- name: Delete Old Releases
  uses: dev-drprasad/delete-older-releases@v0.2.1
  with:
    keep_latest: 5
  env:
    GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

name: Git Tag Management
desc: 自動根據日期生成 Git 標籤
code:
- name: Create Tag
  run: | 
    TAG_NAME="v$(date +'%Y.%m.%d-%H%M')"
    git tag $TAG_NAME
    git push origin $TAG_NAME

name: Docker Build & Push
desc: 自動構建容器鏡像並推送至託管平台
code:
- name: Build Docker
  uses: docker/build-push-action@v4
  with:
    push: true
    tags: user/mobsys-app:latest

name: Code Coverage Report
desc: 計算代碼測試覆蓋率並顯示圖表
code:
- name: Coverage
  uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
  with:
    token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

name: File Integrity Check
desc: 驗證下載資源的 SHA-256 哈希值
code:
- name: Verify Hash
  run: echo "${{ hash }} file.zip" | sha256sum -c -

name: Action Input Validation
desc: 在任務開始前驗證手動輸入參數是否合法
code:
if: "${{ github.event.inputs.version != '' }}"
run: echo "Validating ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}"

name: Slack Integration
desc: 企業級通訊軟體的任務狀態實時同步

name: Auto Branch Merger
desc: 測試通過後自動將開發分支合併到主分支
code:
- uses: devmasx/merge-branch@master
  with:
    type: now
    from_branch: dev
    target_branch: main

name: Dependabot Security
desc: 自動監測依賴漏洞並發送更新 PR
code:
# .github/dependabot.yml
version: 2
updates:
  - package-ecosystem: "npm"
    directory: "/"
    schedule:
      interval: "daily"

name: Custom Action Shell
desc: 編寫專屬 Bash 腳本處理複雜數據矩陣
code:
- name: Custom Script
  shell: bash
  run: | 
    for file in ./data/*; do
      echo "Processing $file"
    done

name: Node.js Env Setup
desc: 快速配置 Node 執行環境與全局快取
code:
- uses: actions/setup-node@v3
  with:
    node-version: '20'
    cache: 'npm'

name: Python Script Runner
desc: 利用 Python 進行資料爬取與自動化處理
code:
- uses: actions/setup-python@v4
  with:
    python-version: '3.10'
- run: python main.py

name: FFmpeg Transcoding
desc: 在雲端自動進行影音格式轉換處理
code:
- name: FFmpeg Auto
  run: ffmpeg -i input.mov -vcodec libx264 out.mp4

name: GitHub Pages Deploy
desc: 專用 Action 快速部署至靜態分頁
code: - uses: actions/deploy-pages@v2

name: ReadMe Auto Update
desc: 根據最新 Commit 紀錄自動更新首頁文檔
code:
- name: Update Readme
  run: python scripts/update_readme.py

name: Traffic Stats Logger
desc: 定時紀錄並保存倉庫訪問流量趨勢數據
code: - uses: sangonzalez/repository-traffic-action@v0.1.6

name: Auto To-Do Creator
desc: 根據代碼中的 //TODO 標註自動生成 Issue
code: - uses: al-chemi/todo-to-issue-action@v4.11

name: Workflow Visualization
desc: 生成視覺化的任務執行路徑圖
code:
# 透過 GitHub Actions 介面直接查看 Actions Graph
# 無需額外代碼，僅需在 YAML 中定義正向依賴 (needs)
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

name: Manual Approval Step
desc: 需要人工確認後才執行的部署步驟
code:
jobs:
  production-deploy:
    environment: 
      name: production
      reviewers: [my-github-id]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

name: Dynamic Env Config
desc: 根據不同觸發者切換權限配置

name: Gzip/Brotli Comp
desc: 預先壓縮靜態檔案提升傳輸速度
code:
- name: Compress
  run: |
    gzip -k dist/*.js
    brotli dist/*.js

name: Cloudflare Purge
desc: 部署後自動清理 CDN 緩存

name: Usage Quota Monitor

name: Submodule Update

- name: Rate Limit Check

    # 自訂檢查邏輯：24小時內觸發超過50次則阻斷
    if [ $TRIGGER_COUNT -gt 50 ]; then exit 1; fi

  .micro-btn:active { transform: scale(0.85); }

name: Haptic Feedback
desc: 互動成功時的手機微震動模擬 (JS)
code:
<script>
  function hapticSuccess() {
    if (navigator.vibrate) navigator.vibrate([30, 10, 30]);
  }
</script>
<button onclick="hapticSuccess()" style="border:1px solid #06C755; color:#06C755; padding:10px;">操作成功反饋</button>

name: Dynamic Favicon
desc: 瀏覽器圖籤隨進度或通知數變更
code:
<script>
  function updateFavicon(count) {
    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    canvas.width = 32; canvas.height = 32;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.fillStyle = '#06C755'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(16, 16, 16, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'white'; ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial'; ctx.fillText(count, 10, 24);
    document.querySelector('link[rel="icon"]').href = canvas.toDataURL();
  }
</script>
<button onclick="updateFavicon(5)">模擬新通知</button>

name: Dark Mode Transition
desc: 切換光暗模式時的淡入淡出演化
code:
<style>
  body {
    transition: background-color 0.5s ease, color 0.5s ease;
  }
  .dark { background: #111; color: #06C755; }
</style>
<button onclick="document.body.classList.toggle('dark')">切換模式</button>

<script>
  window.onscroll = () => {
    document.getElementById('btnTop').style.display = window.scrollY > 300 ? 'block' : 'none';
  };
  document.getElementById('btnTop').onclick = () => window.scrollTo({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'});
</script>

desc: 點擊按鈕時從指尖擴散的水波紋特效
code:
<style>
  .ripple { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .ripple-circle { position: absolute; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); border-radius: 50%; transform: scale(0); animation: ripple 0.6s linear; pointer-events: none; }
  @keyframes ripple { to { transform: scale(4); opacity: 0; } }
</style>
<button class="ripple" onclick="const circle = document.createElement('div'); const d = Math.max(this.clientWidth, this.clientHeight); circle.style.width = circle.style.height = d + 'px'; circle.style.left = event.offsetX - d/2 + 'px'; circle.style.top = event.offsetY - d/2 + 'px'; circle.classList.add('ripple-circle'); this.appendChild(circle); setTimeout(()=>circle.remove(), 600);" style="background:#06C755; color:white; padding:15px 30px; border:none; border-radius:8px;">點擊波紋測試</button>

<script>
  function setThemeColor(hex) {
    let meta = document.querySelector('meta[name="theme-color"]');
    if (!meta) {
      meta = document.createElement('meta'); meta.name = 'theme-color'; document.head.appendChild(meta);
    }
    meta.content = hex;
  }
</script>
<button onclick="setThemeColor('#06C755')">變更為綠色模式</button>

<script>
  const img = new Image(); img.src = 'pic.jpg';
  img.onload = () => {
    const v = new Vibrant(img); const swatches = v.swatches();

</script>

name: Perspective Scroll
desc: 隨著頁面捲動，元素會以 3D 透視方式向後退場
code:
<style>
  .p-item { transition: 0.2s; }
</style>
<script>
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const items = document.querySelectorAll('.p-item');
    items.forEach(el => {
      const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      const rot = Math.min(Math.max(rect.top / 10, 0), 45);
      el.style.transform = `perspective(500px) rotateX(${rot}deg) scale(${1 - rot/100})`;
    });
  });
</script>

name: Titi Visual Core

    reduceMotion: window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches
  };
  if(!TitiUI.reduceMotion) TitiUI.init();
</script>

desc: 終極佈局控制器：自動檢測容器寬度並切換組件模式
code:
<script>
  const obs = new ResizeObserver(entries => {
    for (let entry of entries) {
      entry.target.style.background = entry.contentRect.width < 500 ? '#111' : '#1a1a1a';
    }
  });
  obs.observe(document.body);
</script>

name: Local Storage Sync
desc: 本地存儲數據的簡易封裝讀寫
code:
<script>
  const DB = {
    save: (key, val) => localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(val)),
    get: (key) => JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key))
  };
</script>

name: JSON Prettifier
desc: 在網頁端將混亂的 JSON 字串格式化輸出

name: Base64 Encoder
desc: 前端圖片或字串轉 Base64 處理
code:
<script>
  const toBase64 = str => btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(str)));
  console.log(toBase64('Ⲙ𝔬ⲃⳝ𝔭'));
</script>

name: Session Timeout
desc: 檢測用戶閒置時間並自動登出或鎖定
code:
<script>
  let timer;
  window.onload = resetTimer;
  document.onmousemove = resetTimer;
  function resetTimer() {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => alert('連線逾時'), 1800000);
  }
</script>

name: Form Data Export
desc: 將表單內容快速匯出為可下載的 JSON 檔
code:
<script>
  function exportJSON(data) {
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data)], {type: 'application/json'});
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = 'data.json'; a.click();
  }
</script>

name: Input Sanitizer
desc: 防止 XSS 攻擊的基本輸入過濾器
code:
<script>
  const sanitize = str => str.replace(/[&< barracks >"']/g, m => ({
    '&': '&', '<': '<', '>': '>', '"': '"', "'": '''
  }[m]));
</script>

name: CryptoJS AES
desc: 前端數據高度加密，防止敏感資訊外洩
code:
<script src='https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/crypto-js/4.1.1/crypto-js.min.js'></script>
<script>
  const encrypt = (msg, key) => CryptoJS.AES.encrypt(msg, key).toString();
  const decrypt = (cip, key) => CryptoJS.AES.decrypt(cip, key).toString(CryptoJS.enc.Utf8);
</script>

name: JWT Decoder
desc: 解析並驗證 JWT Token 的過期時間與權限
code:
<script>
  const parseJwt = token => JSON.parse(atob(token.split('.')[1]));
</script>

name: Rate Limiter (JS)
desc: 防止用戶短時間內重複點擊 API 按鈕
code:
<script>
  let isLock = false;
  function secureSubmit() {
    if (isLock) return;
    isLock = true; 
    console.log('API Request...');
    setTimeout(() => isLock = false, 2000);
  }
</script>

name: Web Worker Sort
desc: 在後台線程處理海量數據排序，不卡頓 UI
code:
<script>
  const worker = new Worker(URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([`onmessage=e=>postMessage(e.data.sort())`])));
  worker.onmessage = e => console.log('Sorted:', e.data);
  worker.postMessage([5, 2, 9, 1]);
</script>

name: Data Masking
code:
<script>
  const mask = (str, start, end) => 
    str.substring(0, start) + '*'.repeat(end - start) + str.substring(end);
  console.log(mask('mobsys-admin-2026', 7, 12));
</script>

name: Query Param Parser
desc: 快速獲取網址列中的特定參數
code:
<script>
  const getParam = (name) => new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get(name);
</script>

name: IndexedDB Wrapper
desc: 在瀏覽器中建立大型結構化數據庫
code:
<script>
  const request = indexedDB.open('MobSysDB', 1);
  request.onupgradeneeded = e => e.target.result.createObjectStore('matrix', {keyPath: 'id'});
</script>

name: Auto Fill Preventer
desc: 防止瀏覽器自動填入敏感表單
code:
<input type='password' autocomplete='new-password' style='display:none;'>
<input type='text' readonly onfocus='this.removeAttribute("readonly")' placeholder='安全輸入'>

name: Fetch Interceptor
desc: 統一處理 API 請求的 Header 與錯誤響應
code:
<script>
  const secureFetch = (url, opt) => fetch(url, { ...opt, headers: { 'X-Titi-Token': 'AUTH_KEY' } });
</script>

name: Data Integrity Hash
desc: 對 JSON 數據流進行校驗，防止中途篡改
code:
<script>
  const checkIntegrity = async (data, hash) => {
    const msgUint8 = new TextEncoder().encode(data);
    const hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', msgUint8);
    return btoa(String.fromCharCode(...new Uint8Array(hashBuffer))) === hash;
  };
</script>

name: OTP Input Logic
desc: 自動跳轉下一格的一次性驗證碼組件

name: CORS Preflight Check
desc: 檢測當前環境是否支援跨域資源共享
code:
<script>
  fetch('api/check', { method: 'OPTIONS' }).catch(() => console.error('CORS Blocked'));
</script>

name: Bio-Auth Trigger
desc: 調用手機原生 FaceID / 指紋識別 (WebAuthn)
code:
<script>
  async function bioCheck() {
    const credential = await navigator.credentials.create({ publicKey: {...} });
  }
</script>

name: Encrypted Export
desc: 密碼保護的加密數據導出 (AES + Blob)
code:
<script>
  function exportSecure(data, pass) {
    const encrypted = CryptoJS.AES.encrypt(JSON.stringify(data), pass).toString();
    exportJSON({ payload: encrypted });
  }
</script>

name: SQL Injection Mock
desc: 針對前端模擬輸入的安全性自動測試
code:
<script>
  const payloads = ["' OR 1=1 --", "<script>alert(1)</script>"];
  payloads.forEach(p => console.log('Testing payload:', sanitize(p)));
</script>

name: Offline Data Sync
desc: 斷網時存入 DB，恢復連線後自動同步
code:
<script>
  window.ononline = () => { 
    const data = DB.getPending(); 
    if(data) secureFetch('/sync', { body: data });
  };
</script>

name: Zero-Knowledge Proof
desc: 零知識證明邏輯模組 (簡易概念實現)
code:
<script>
  // 證明者在不告知密碼的情況下，證明自己擁有密碼
  const prove = (x) => Math.pow(g, x) % p;
</script>

name: Canvas Fingerprint
desc: 利用繪圖引擎生成唯一的瀏覽器指紋
code:
<script>
  const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  ctx.fillText('Ⲙ𝔬ⲃⳝ𝔭', 2, 2);
  const fingerprint = canvas.toDataURL().slice(-50);
</script>

name: Titi Data Shield
desc: 動態混淆全局變數與數據結構，防止控制台掃描
code:
<script>
  (function() {
    const _secret = 'PRIVATE_KEY';
    window.TitiVault = { lock: () => console.log('Shield Active') };
    delete window.TitiVault.lock; // 僅限內部閉包調用
  })();
</script>

name: WebSocket Client
desc: 建立長連接，實現伺服器數據實時推送
code:
<script>
  const socket = new WebSocket('wss://api.mobsys.io/stream');
  socket.onmessage = e => console.log('實時數據：', JSON.parse(e.data));
</script>

name: Network Status Mon
desc: 即時監測用戶網路連線品質 (RTT/下行速度)
code:
<script>
  const conn = navigator.connection || {};
  console.log(`網路類型: ${conn.effectiveType}, 延遲: ${conn.rtt}ms`);
</script>

name: Binary Data Parser
desc: 解析 ArrayBuffer 二進制流，比 JSON 更省流量
code:
<script>
  const buffer = new Uint8Array([77, 111, 98, 83, 121, 115]);
  const text = new TextDecoder().decode(buffer);
  console.log('解碼結果：', text);
</script>

name: Incremental Backup
desc: 僅備份變動過的數據快照 (Diff Logic)
code:
<script>
  const getDiff = (oldObj, newObj) => 
    Object.keys(newObj).filter(k => oldObj[k] !== newObj[k]);
</script>

name: Request De-bounce
desc: 防止輸入框即時搜尋時觸發過多 API 請求
code:
<script>
  const debounce = (fn, delay) => {
    let t; return (...args) => {
      clearTimeout(t); t = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay);
    };
  };
</script>

name: Virtual Scroll List
desc: 僅渲染可視區域的 DOM，流暢處理 10 萬筆數據

name: Resource Prefetch
desc: 空閒時預先加載下一頁所需的 JSON 資源
code: <link rel='prefetch' href='/api/next-batch.json'>

name: Memory Leak Check
desc: 監測 JS 堆棧內存，防止長時間運行導致瀏覽器崩潰
code:
<script>
  if(performance.memory) {
    console.log(`內存限制: ${performance.memory.jsHeapSizeLimit / 1024 / 1024}MB`);
  }
</script>

name: Service Worker Cache
desc: PWA 核心技術，攔截請求並實現秒開離線訪問

name: Data Sharding
desc: 大數據分片處理，避免單次請求過大阻塞線程
code:
<script>
  const shard = (data, size) => 
    Array.from({length: Math.ceil(data.length/size)}, (v, i) => data.slice(i*size, i*size+size));
</script>

name: XHR Progress Track
desc: 精確顯示大檔案上傳/下載的百分比進度
code:
<script>
  const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
  xhr.upload.onprogress = e => console.log(`上傳中: ${Math.round(e.loaded/e.total*100)}%`);
</script>

name: Steganography Tool
desc: 數位浮水印：將敏感 ID 隱藏在 Canvas 圖像像素中
code:
<script>
  // 利用像素點的 R 通道最低位 (LSB) 嵌入隱藏資訊
  const embed = (pixel, bit) => (pixel & 0xFE) | bit;
</script>

name: WebAssembly Loader
desc: 加載 C++/Rust 編譯的 .wasm，進行極速運算
code:
<script>
  WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming(fetch('matrix.wasm'), {}).then(obj => {
    console.log('WASM 加速器已就緒');
  });
</script>

name: Dynamic API Gateway
desc: 自動根據延遲與地區選擇最快的數據節點
code:
<script>
  const nodes = ['https://us.api', 'https://asia.api'];
  Promise.any(nodes.map(n => fetch(n))).then(res => console.log('選用節點:', res.url));
</script>

name: Titi Sentinel Pro
desc: 全自動安全哨兵：偵測開發者工具是否開啟並干擾逆向工程
code:
<script>
  setInterval(() => {
    const start = performance.now(); debugger;
    if(performance.now() - start > 100) document.body.innerHTML = 'Security Alert';
  }, 1000);
</script>

name: Data Anomaly Det
desc: 利用標準差 (Z-Score) 自動偵測異常數據流入
code:
<script>
  const isAnomaly = (val, avg, std) => Math.abs(val - avg) > 2 * std;
  if(isAnomaly(999, 10, 2)) alert('偵測到異常數據入侵！');
</script>

name: SVG Chart Engine
desc: 輕量級純 SVG 代碼生成的實時折線圖
code:
<svg width='200' height='60'>
  <polyline fill='none' stroke='#06C755' stroke-width='2' points='0,60 40,20 80,40 120,10 160,50 200,30' />
</svg>

name: Client-Side Search
desc: 高性能全文檢索，支援模糊匹配與高亮
code:
<script>
  const search = (q, list) => list.filter(item => item.name.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()));
</script>

name: AI Trend Predictor
desc: 基於線性回歸的簡單數據趨勢預測算法
code:
<script>
  // y = mx + b 邏輯預測下一個數據點
  const predict = (data) => { /* 最小平方法實現 */ return nextVal; };
</script>

name: Titi Data Visual
desc: 數據全景視圖：自動將 JSON 轉化為多維度雷達圖
code:
<script>
  // 繪製多邊形代表數據維度強度
  ctx.beginPath(); points.forEach(p => ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y)); ctx.fill();
</script>

name: System Self-Heal
desc: 偵測到核心變數遺失時，自動重新加載備份配置
code:
<script>
  if(!window.MobSys) { 
    console.warn('Recovering...'); 
    localStorage.getItem('backup_config'); 
  }
</script>

name: Matrix Garbage Col
desc: 主動清理過時快取與 DOM 碎片，保持系統輕盈
code:
<script>
  const cleanup = () => { 
    document.querySelectorAll('.temp-node').forEach(n => n.remove()); 
    caches.delete('old-assets'); 
  };
</script>

name: Hot-Reload Module
desc: 無需刷新頁面，動態替換並更新矩陣組件邏輯
code:
<script>
  function updateModule(id, newCode) {
    eval(newCode); // 受限環境下使用
    console.log(`Module ${id} Hot-Swapped.`);
  }
</script>

name: Titi Master Init
desc: 全系統啟動序列：按順序激活 GitHub、UI 與 Data 模組
code:
<script>
  const boot = async () => {
    await Actions.init(); UI.apply(); Data.sync();
    console.log('Ⲙ𝔬ⲃⳝ𝔭 Matrix 250: Fully Operational.');
  };
</script>

name: The Infinity Loop
desc: 最後的標記：確保矩陣可無限擴展的元數據結構
